scenario: FR-045 (GOV-002) Stop-ordering state matrix. Digest-mismatch precedence is ABSOLUTE across every outcome (a stale result is superseded, never blocks/decides/reports/authorizes). Final corrections: a REQUIRED review that is absent with nothing in flight routes to required-review-not-started (not wait-poll-existing); a human-DISPOSITIONED exact-current-digest review renders the packet ONLY when the disposition is durable AND digest-bound.
note: Routing is a PURE function of (review_terminal, review_outcome, digest_matches_current, in_flight_present, human_dispositioned, disposition_durable_and_digest_bound). No Stop-hook or capture path is exercised.

matrix.why: no review result AND nothing in flight: suppress packet/marker and route to required-review-not-started — there is no run to wait on.
a required review for the current digest is running: wait/poll the single tracked in-flight run.
a second Stop while one review is in flight must NOT launch a second review.
terminal + clean + exact current digest: the packet + marker path, bound to the accepted reviewed-tree digest.
actionable findings at the current digest suppress packet + marker; fix then re-review.
an undispositioned human-judgment review is a narrow non-boundary question, no options, no marker.
a human DISPOSITIONED the review at the current digest AND the disposition is durable + digest-bound: the packet may render (the human's durable call authorizes the boundary).
a disposition that is NOT durable + digest-bound cannot authorize a boundary — fail closed to the narrow question.
a timeout / infra failure at the current digest reports the SPECIFIC failure; never represented as clean.
a clean review whose digest != current is SUPERSEDED; a fresh review of the current digest is needed.
ABSOLUTE PRECEDENCE: a stale actionable result must NOT block on an old tree; superseded — re-review the current digest.
ABSOLUTE PRECEDENCE beats a durable disposition: a disposition bound to a STALE digest never authorizes the CURRENT boundary; superseded — re-review the current digest.
ABSOLUTE PRECEDENCE: a stale infra failure is superseded — re-review the current digest.
an earlier-digest clean result while a current-digest review is in flight is superseded; wait for the in-flight current-digest review.

invariant: capturable_as_verdict is true for EXACTLY the terminal+current-digest states that are clean OR human-dispositioned-durable-and-digest-bound; render_marker implies capturable_as_verdict and both imply terminal AND digest_matches_current; a digest mismatch forces render_packet=render_marker=capturable=false for EVERY outcome (even a durable human disposition bound to a stale digest); launch_review is never true on the Stop path.
